sections.paragraph: adv. (for פִּתְעֹם from פֶּתַע a moment, with the termination -ֹם and ע changed into א), suddenly, in a moment, Jos 10:9. It is also put after nouns in genit., as פַּחַר פִּתְאֹם sudden terror, Pro 3:25 often after פֶּתַע (with an intensitive power) בְּפֶתַע פִתְאֹם Num 6:9 לְפֶתַע פִּתְאֹם Isa 29:5 also transp. פִּתְאֹם לְפֶתַע Isai. 30:13 . With prefix בְּפִתְאֹם 2Ch 29:36.
